tooltip.potionrelicsmod.nightvisionrelic: Grants sight even in the darkest of nights.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.strengthrelic: Turns you into a one man army.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.dolphinsgracerel: You are accompanied by the soul of a dolphin condensed into gold.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.invisibilityreli: Every cell in your body gains the iridophores of a chameleon.
